calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2026 Continued To Jun-24-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Andrew Catterall, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Soumya Sastry via Zoom Video Webinar.
Alexander Fisher, Esq. appearing for Defendatn Steven Huang via Zoom Video Webinar.

Hearing held.

After hearing the arguments, the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE Re: Preliminary Injunction

is DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden to show irreparable harm not compensable by money damages and likelihood of prevailing on the merits.

Prevailing Party to submit proposed order that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion For Plaintiff?S Motion For A Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF SOUMYA SASTRY Notice Of Motion For Plaintiff?S Motion For A Preliminary Injunction

is OFF CALENDAR. On December 8, 2026 Plaintiff obtained an Order to Show Cause Re: Preliminaury Injunction setting the hearing on January 7, 2026. This motion was filed on December 12, 2025 apparently also seeking injunctive relief without any request to take the OSC off calendar.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Continued To Jan-29-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

is continued to January 29, 2026 for opposing party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of opposition no later than January 12, 2026 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. (moving papers and reply received).

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)
